name: News Ticker
description: Right-scrolling Google News headline ticker (en-US RSS, keyless).

zh-Hant.name: 新聞跑馬燈
zh-Hant.description: 由右向左捲動的 Google News 標題跑馬燈（en-US RSS，免金鑰）。

zh-Hans.name: 新闻跑马灯
zh-Hans.description: 由右向左滚动的 Google News 标题跑马灯（en-US RSS，免密钥）。

lang.desc: Google News locale (which language/region to serve). e.g. zh-TW for Traditional-Chinese Taiwan news.

topics.desc: Comma-separated topics (no spaces), e.g. "top,world,科技". top=Google News top stories, anything else=a search keyword. Overrides the topics.default file.
